Dharam Das

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Circumcision ceremony for Akbar’s sons, painting 126 from an Akbar-nama (Book of Akbar) of Abu’l Fazl (Indian, 1551–1602)
by Dharam Das
Mughal India, court of Akbar (reigned 1556–1605) · c. 1602–3 · gum tempera, ink, and gold on paper
